ddls:
CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label or name of the node */,
  "timeset" REAL /* Timestamp or time set associated with the node */,
  "degree" INTEGER /* Number of direct connections the node has */,
  "weighted_degree" INTEGER /* Weighted degree considering the importance of connections */,
  "eccentricity" REAL /* Eccentricity measure of the node */,
  "closeness_centrality" REAL /* Closeness centrality measure of the node */,
  "harmonic_closeness_centrality" REAL /* Harmonic closeness centrality measure of the node */,
  "betweenness_centrality" REAL /* Betweenness centrality measure of the node */,
  "component_number" INTEGER /* Component number indicating the sub-network the node belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the node */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of node */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the node was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the node was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "edges" (
  "edge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each edge */,
  "source_node_id" TEXT /* ID of the source node for the edge */,
  "target_node_id" TEXT /* ID of the target node for the edge */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the edge indicating the strength of the connection */,
  "edge_type" TEXT /* Type of edge */,
  "edge_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the edge */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the edge was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the edge was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edges_target_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edges_source_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network */,
  "network_name" TEXT /* Name of the network */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the network */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the network was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the network was last updated */,
  "network_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the network */,
  "network_type" TEXT /* Type of network */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "node_id" TEXT /* ID of the node for which the metric is calculated */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "calculated_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was calculated */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metric */,
  "calculated_by" TEXT /* User or algorithm that calculated the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_metrics_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "edge_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "edge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the edge for which the metric is calculated */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "calculated_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was calculated */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metric */,
  "calculated_by" TEXT /* User or algorithm that calculated the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edge_metrics_edge_id FOREIGN KEY ("edge_id") REFERENCES edges ("edge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "user_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the network */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the network was accessed */,
  "actions" TEXT /* Actions performed by the user */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the actions performed */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the user session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network analyzed in the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the query */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network queried */,
  "query_string" TEXT /* Query string executed */,
  "executed_date" TEXT /* Date the query was executed */,
  "query_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the query */,
  "query_type" TEXT /* Type of query */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the request */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint accessed */,
  "request_params" TEXT /* Parameters passed in the API request */,
  "response_status" TEXT /* Status of the API response */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the API request was made */,
  "request_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the request */,
  "api_endpoint_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the API endpoint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the export */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network exported */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date the data was exported */,
  "export_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the export */,
  "export_format_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the export format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the import */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network imported */,
  "import_format" TEXT /* Format of the imported data */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date the data was imported */,
  "import_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the import */,
  "import_format_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the import format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the permission is assigned */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network for which the permission is assigned */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the permission */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
